golden_categories.name: Standard FQDN Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates fully qualified domain names (FQDN) with default options.

golden_categories.name: Trailing Dot Option
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with the option to allow a trailing dot.

golden_categories.name: No TLD Requirement
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs without requiring a top-level domain (TLD).

golden_categories.name: Numeric TLDs Without Requirement
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with numeric TLDs when TLD requirement is disabled.

golden_categories.name: Wildcard Option
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with the option to allow wildcard domains.

golden_categories.name: Combined Options
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with multiple options enabled: trailing dot, underscores, and numeric TLDs.

generated_categories.name: Default Validation Behavior
generated_categories.description: Tests the baseline behavior of the isFQDN validator with default options.

generated_categories.name: Optional TLD Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when TLD requirement is disabled.

generated_categories.name: Underscore Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when underscores are allowed in domain names.

generated_categories.name: Trailing Dot Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when trailing dots are allowed in domain names.

generated_categories.name: Numeric TLD Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when numeric TLDs are allowed.

generated_categories.name: Wildcard Domain Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when wildcard domains are allowed.

generated_categories.name: Max Length Ignoring
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when domain length restrictions are ignored.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on the default validation behavior of the isFQDN validator with no additional options enabled.
Both categories address the validation of FQDNs with trailing dots allowed.
Both categories focus on disabling the TLD requirement during validation.
Both categories address the validation of numeric TLDs when the TLD requirement is disabled.
Both categories focus on validating FQDNs with wildcard domains allowed.
No generated category matches the combination of trailing dot, underscores, and numeric TLD options.

generated_to_golden.reason: The generated category tests the default behavior of the isFQDN validator, which aligns with the golden category for standard FQDN validation.
The generated category tests the behavior of the validator when the TLD requirement is disabled, which matches the golden category for no TLD requirement.
The generated category focuses on underscore handling, which is not covered by any golden category.
The generated category tests trailing dot handling, which aligns with the golden category for trailing dot option.
The generated category tests numeric TLD validation, which matches the golden category for numeric TLDs without requirement.
The generated category tests wildcard domain validation, which aligns with the golden category for wildcard option.
The generated category focuses on ignoring max length restrictions, which is not covered by any golden category.

novel_generated_categories.reason: The generated category addresses underscore handling, which is not a behavior described by any golden category.
The generated category addresses ignoring max length restrictions, which is not a behavior described by any golden category.

missing_golden_categories.reason: No generated categories achieved strong or partial semantic overlap with this fixed golden category.
